minimum_acceptance_targets.evidence: done: local fixture represents all intended evidence labels
minimum_acceptance_targets.ner: done: local fixture includes broad checked-in NER labels
minimum_acceptance_targets.provenance: done: source PMID, source type, and research-use warning are preserved
minimum_acceptance_targets.relation: done: local fixture includes positive relation rows and NO_RELATION rows
minimum_acceptance_targets.splits: done: PMID separation across train, validation, and test

promotion_rule: Gold pack remains a research scaffold until larger reviewed data volumes are available, readiness reports show stable non-empty task splits, label maps match current configs, and governance passes without relying on scaffold exemptions.
warning: Research-use only. Not medical advice. Not intended for diagnosis, treatment selection, or clinical decision-making.
